##  At your fingertips:  
a dedicated career coach 
Want to start a new dream career? Successfully build your startup? Itching to learn high-demand skills? Work smart with an online mentor by your side to offer expert advice and guidance to match your zeal. Become unstoppable using MentorCruise. 
Thousands of mentors available 
Flexible program structures 
Free trial 
Personal chats 
1-on-1 calls 
97% satisfaction rate 
[ Browse mentors ](https://mentorcruise.com/mentor/browse/)
![MentorCruise Explainer](https://cdn.mentorcruise.com/img/home/illustrations/explainer.png)
6,900+ 
Available mentors 
38,000+ 
Matches made 
130+ 
Countries represented 
5 out of 5 stars
> "Having access to the knowledge and experience of mentors on MentorCruise was an opportunity I couldn't miss. Thanks to my mentor, I managed to reach my goal of joining Tesla."
![Michele Verriello](https://cdn.mentorcruise.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=crop,height=128,width=128,format=auto/https://cdn.mentorcruise.com/cache/51b9b6c48dff947dddc1505b0ab928eb/31a265d092b9acca/f93516c87fe878649fa346f33faa6e39.jpg)
[ Michele Verriello  Software Engineer at Tesla  ](https://mentorcruise.com/blog/unlocking-potential-and-landing-a-dream-internship-at-tesla/)
##  Long-term mentorship isn't just better – it's faster 
![Discover](https://cdn.mentorcruise.com/img/home/illustrations/discover.svg)
Explore a curated network of vetted mentors – engineers, designers, founders, and more. Find someone who matches your goals, skills, and budget. 
![Start](https://cdn.mentorcruise.com/img/home/illustrations/start.svg)
Choose a flexible plan that fits your pace – whether it's Q&A chats, regular calls, or something in between, your mentor will help you build a personalized roadmap. 
![Meet](https://cdn.mentorcruise.com/img/home/illustrations/meet.svg)
Get ongoing support through regular calls, check-ins, and feedback. Your mentor stays with you for the long haul. 
![Grow](https://cdn.mentorcruise.com/img/home/illustrations/grow.svg)
Mentees who stick with their mentor for 3+ months reach their goals 2x faster than they would on their own. Fewer dead ends, more breakthroughs. 
##  Explore 6,900+ available mentors 
Find mentors

Try your first call for free with every mentor you're meeting. Cancel anytime, no questions asked.

> "My mentor gave me great tips on how to make my resume and portfolio better and he had great job recommendations during my career change. He assured me many times that there were still a lot of transferable skills that employers would really love."

##  An arsenal of industry veterans and mentoring packages at a flexible price. 
Pick from a curated collection of mentors and services. Try them out with no obligation. Found your mentoring sessions useful? Move to a low-cost, monthly mentoring subscription. No lock-ins, no hidden fees – Just accelerated professional growth. 
![Cheng Qian](https://cdn.mentorcruise.com/cdn-cgi/image/width=364,format=auto/https://cdn.mentorcruise.com/cache/dd0bf1e831edb140232ac94207c402f8/13772a7c521f832f/0b401dfbf945723425b20c440a3f064e.jpg)
